column3: Player's position group: DEF (defenders), MID (midfielders), ATT (attackers).
Expected Goals per 90 minutes, excluding penalties and own goals.
Expected Threat created through passes and crosses per 90 minutes. Measures scoring opportunities generated via all pass types including crosses.
Expected Threat created through passes only per 90 minutes. Excludes crosses.
Passes that move the ball significantly towards the opponent's goal per 90 minutes.
Ball carries that move the ball significantly towards the opponent's goal per 90 minutes.
Ball carries that enter the opponent's penalty box per 90 minutes.
Progressive passes received per 90 minutes. Measures how often a player is the target of forward-moving passes.
Percentage of passes successfully completed, calculated from total successful passes divided by total attempted passes across all matches.
Defensive actions (tackles, interceptions, clearances) performed in the opponent's half per 90 minutes. Indicates an aggressive, high-pressing defensive contribution.
Percentage of tackle attempts that were successful, calculated from total successful tackles divided by total tackle attempts across all matches.
Total aerial duels contested per 90 minutes.
Percentage of aerial duels won, calculated from total aerials won divided by total aerials contested across all matches.
